data.content: Plan review rejected. Child knots-c8f4 was rolled back because the file inventory for output-target canonicalization is incomplete: loom/knots_sdlc/profiles/autopilot_with_pr_no_planning.loom still declares legacy output pr but is not included in the planned edits. Rework the parent/child plans to cover the full legacy-output sweep, then return to plan review.
